title: Paella
text: Paella is a rice dish from Valencia in Spain. Traditional paella often includes rice, saffron, vegetables, and seafood or meat.

title: Hummus
text: Hummus is a spread made from cooked chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, and garlic. It is widely eaten in Middle Eastern cuisine.

title: Risotto
text: Risotto is a northern Italian rice dish cooked slowly with broth until it becomes creamy. It is often associated with Lombardy and Piedmont.
